creator: skh1002@hotmail.com
text:
I am trying to compile this port (v 9.16_5) on FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p8 and still getting this exact behaviour. 

make[1]: don't know how to make post-install-docs. Stop

make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base
*** Error code 2

Stop.

I can only build it if either DOCS=off or GS_pcl3=on.
